Here’s a **practical 1-week grocery plan for 1–2 people**, capped at your **₹2,000** budget. Prices are typical Indian retail ranges (ONDC listings wi

state.hint:
Samantha

Here’s a **practical 1-week grocery plan for 1–2 people**, capped at your **₹2,000** budget. Prices are typical Indian retail ranges (ONDC listings will vary by seller and day); payment here stays simulated until you checkout in the Buyer app. --- ## Weekly plan narrative This

2,000 - Proteins/veg: ₹350–1,300 - Dairy/oil/spices: ₹300–700 - Total: usually around ₹1,500–₹3,000 depending on choices and brands. Tip: if you choose budget staples (bulk rice/atta, generic spice blends), you often stay closer to the lower end. If you pick premium brands or more protein-heavy items, it can creep up—but you can keep it within budget with moderate quantities and seasonal veggies.

Send
Prefe
